name: IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.BRANDING_ID, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.OBJECT_STATUS, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.THEME_ID, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.CREATED_BY, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.CREATION_DATE, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.CUSTOM_JS, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.DEFAULT_JS, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.CUSTOM_CSS, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.DEFAULT_CSS, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.FRONT_IMAGE_URL, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.LOGO_IMAGE_URL, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.MOBILE_FRONT_IMAGE_URL, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.MOBILE_LOGO_IMAGE_URL, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.NAVIGATION_HEADER_HTML, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.NAVIGATION_FOOTER_HTML, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.CORPORATE_ICON_URL FROM IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B, IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL WHERE IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_B.BRANDING_ID = IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.BRANDING_ID AND IRC_CX_SITE_BRANDS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
